正确拒绝超长输入 (12500 chars)，状态码 422

content_tests.input_text: Artificial intelligence is transforming the way we work and live.
content_tests.output: AI is changing how we go about our daily lives and jobs.

content_tests.input_text: Machine learning algorithms have become increasingly sophisticated in recent years. These systems can now process vast amounts of data and identify patterns that would be impossible for humans to detect manually. As a result, industries across the board are adopting these technologies to improve efficiency and decision-making.
content_tests.output: These days, machine learning has gotten scarily good at spotting patterns we'd never catch ourselves. The tech can crunch through mountains of data in ways that leave human analysts in the dust. It's no surprise everyone from hospitals to hedge funds is jumping on board - the efficiency gains are just too good to pass up.

content_tests.input_text: The evolution of natural language processing has been remarkable. From early rule-based systems to today's large language models, the field has undergone multiple paradigm shifts. Modern LLMs can generate coherent text, answer complex questions, and even write code. However, concerns about AI detection have grown alongside these capabilities. Educators and publishers worry about the authenticity of written content, leading to the development of various AI detection tools. These tools analyze patterns such as sentence structure uniformity, perplexity scores, and burstiness to classify text as human or AI-generated. The cat-and-mouse game between detection and evasion continues to drive innovation on both sides.
content_tests.output: The progress in natural language processing has been nothing short of astonishing. What started with clunky rule-based systems has blossomed into sophisticated language models that can spin out well-structured paragraphs, tackle tricky questions, and even whip up functional code. But here's the rub - as these models get better at mimicking human writing, folks are getting more nervous about telling what's real and what's machine-made. Schools and publishing houses are scrambling to spot AI-written content, giving rise to a whole industry of detection software that picks apart writing patterns, how predictable the wording is, and even the rhythm of sentences. It's turned into this endless back-and-forth where each improvement in detection sparks new ways to fly under the radar, pushing both sides to up their game.

content_tests.input_text: This study investigates the relationship between socioeconomic status and educational outcomes. Using a longitudinal dataset of 5,000 students, we conducted regression analyses controlling for demographic variables. The results indicate a statistically significant positive correlation between household income and standardized test scores (p < 0.001). Furthermore, we found that parental education level mediates this relationship. These findings contribute to the existing literature on educational inequality and have important implications for policy interventions aimed at reducing achievement gaps.
content_tests.output: We looked at how money and family background affect kids' school performance. Following 5,000 students over time, we crunched the numbers while accounting for things like race and neighborhood. Turns out wealthier families tend to have kids who score higher on tests - the link is solid (p < 0.001). What's really interesting? How much education parents have seems to explain part of this connection. This isn't just academic - it matters for policymakers trying to level the playing field in schools.

content_tests.input_text: Dear Team, I am writing to provide an update on the Q3 project timeline. After reviewing the deliverables from last week's sprint, I am pleased to report that we are on track to meet our deadline. The marketing campaign launch is scheduled for next Monday, and the development team has completed 90% of the feature implementation. Please review the attached progress report and let me know if you have any questions. Best regards.
content_tests.output: Hey team, just wanted to give everyone a quick update on where we stand with the Q3 project. I went through last week's deliverables and honestly? Things are looking good—we're actually right on schedule for once! Marketing's big launch is locked in for Monday, and the devs have knocked out nearly all the features already (we're talking 90% done). Take a peek at the report I've attached and shoot me any questions you've got. Cheers!

content_tests.input_text: The old library smelled of dust and forgotten stories. Sunlight streamed through cracked windows, illuminating motes of dust dancing in the air. Maria ran her fingers along the leather-bound spines, feeling the weight of centuries of human thought. Somewhere in this room, she knew, was the answer she'd been searching for. The book that would change everything.
content_tests.output: The musty scent of yellowed pages and long-neglected tales hung thick in the aging library. Golden shafts of sunlight sliced through the grimy windows, catching swirling dust particles that looked almost alive under the glow. Maria's fingertips traced the cracked leather bindings, each groove whispering of generations of knowledge tucked away between leaves. She could feel it in her bones - somewhere among these forgotten tomes lay the key to unraveling everything she'd been chasing. That one special volume just waiting to rewrite her world.

content_tests.input_text: The authentication flow consists of three main steps. First, the client sends a POST request to the /api/auth endpoint with the user's credentials. The server validates the credentials and generates a JWT token with a 24-hour expiration time. Second, the client includes this token in the Authorization header for subsequent requests. Third, the server verifies the token signature and expiration before processing each request. If the token is invalid or expired, the server returns a 401 Unauthorized response.
content_tests.output: Here's how the authentication works - it's a three-step dance. First, you send a POST request to /api/auth with your login details. If everything checks out, the server hands you back a JWT token that's good for 24 hours. After that, you'll need to stick that token in the Authorization header whenever you make another request. The server then takes a quick peek at the token to make sure it's legit and hasn't expired before letting you through. Mess up the token or let it expire, and you'll get slapped with a 401 error quicker than you can say "unauthorized."

content_tests.input_text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. This sentence contains every letter of the alphabet and is commonly used for typing practice and font demonstrations.
content_tests.output: A speedy brown fox leaps right over the sleepy dog. This classic phrase packs every letter from A to Z, making it perfect for practicing keyboard skills and checking out different fonts.

content_tests.input_text: According to the 2024 industry report, global e-commerce sales reached $6.3 trillion, representing a 12.5% increase from the previous year. The top three markets were China with 35%, the United States with 22%, and the United Kingdom with 8%. Mobile commerce accounted for 72% of all online transactions, up from 68% in 2023.
content_tests.output: The latest industry figures for 2024 show global online shopping hitting a whopping $6.3 trillion - that's a solid 12.5% jump compared to last year. China's still leading the pack with 35% of the market, while the US isn't far behind at 22%, and the UK holds steady at 8%. What's really interesting? Nearly three-quarters of all purchases (72% to be exact) now happen on phones, up from 68% just twelve months ago.

content_tests.input_text: The patient presented with acute myocardial infarction accompanied by ventricular tachycardia. Electrocardiogram showed ST-segment elevation in leads V1 through V4. Troponin levels were elevated at 15.2 ng/mL. The patient underwent percutaneous coronary intervention with drug-eluting stent placement in the left anterior descending artery.
content_tests.output: The patient came in with a sudden heart attack and erratic heartbeat. The EKG showed clear signs of trouble with elevated ST segments from V1 to V4, and troponin levels spiked to 15.2 - way above normal. Docs rushed them into the cath lab where they put in a drug-coated stent to open up the blocked left anterior descending artery.

content_tests.input_text: The weather today is absolutely perfect for a picnic.
content_tests.output: It's a dream of a day for packing up some sandwiches and heading outdoors.

content_tests.input_text: Artificial intelligence has become an integral part of modern society. From smartphones to self-driving cars, AI technology is everywhere. The impact on daily life is profound and continues to grow rapidly.
content_tests.output: These days, AI is woven into the fabric of our lives like never before. Whether it's the smartphone in your pocket or that fancy autonomous car cruising down the highway, artificial intelligence is quietly running the show behind the scenes. It's changing how we live in ways we're just starting to understand, and the pace? Well, let's just say it's not slowing down anytime soon.

content_tests.input_text: Machine learning models can sometimes produce biased results
content_tests.output: Sometimes, AI models unintentionally wind up reflecting biases from their training data. It's one of those tricky issues that keeps
